WFD FLoodsViewer

Warning

The definitions are being reviewed.

FloodsMapsReference table

FloodsMapsReference

Attribute

Type

m

Definition

mapReferenceCode

FeatureUniqueEUCodeType(50)

[1]

Unique code for the map reference.

euFloodsUnitOfManagementCode

FeatureUniqueEUCodeType(42)

[0..1]

Unique EU code for the Unit of Management or WFD River Basin District following the WISE identifier syntax. Add the two-letter ISO Country code to the Member State unique id - up to 42 characters in total.

title

string(254)

[1]

Title of the map or map service.

description

string(4000)

[0..1]

Give a short description of the map content, e.g., flood scenarios, exposed elements….

creatorElectronicMailAddress

string(250)

[1]

Contact information for the email..

creatorOrganisationName

string(254)

[1]

Organisation name of the point of contact.

created

WiseDateTime(100)

[0..1]

Date when the map was published. Can be in the format ‘yyyy’ , ‘yyyy-mm’ or ‘yyyy-mm-dd’.

language

Language

[1]

Choose from the ‘LanguageCode’ codelist values.Language of the map.

hyperlink

URL(2100)

[1]

ULR to connect the service with the Flood Hazard Risk Map.

resourceType

ResourceType

[1]

Choose the type of resource from the ‘ResourceType’ codelist valuesWFS WMS,Portal,PDF,Other

modelSchema

FloodsSchema

[1..*]

Choose the type of resource from the ‘ResourceType’ codelist valuesWFS WMS,Portal,PDF,Other
